data.title: KRAKacquisition Corp prices upsized IPO at $300M, offering 30M units at $10 each, listing on Nasdaq under "KRAQU" on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Cheyenne, Wyoming, USA - Jan. 27, 2026 - KRAKacquisition Corp ("Company") has revealed the pricing for its initial public offering of 30,000,000 units at $10.00 each. These units will commence trading on the Nasdaq Global Market in the United States under the ticker symbol "KRAQU" starting January 28, 2026. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. The warrant allows the holder to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. Once trading separately, the Company foresees the Class A ordinary shares and warrants to be listed on Nasdaq as "KRAQ" and "KRAQW," respectively. The closing of this initial public offering is expected on January 29, 2026, pending customary closing conditions.

data.title: The RealReal to release Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026 after the market closes. (Numbers: Dec 31, 2025)
data.description: SAN FRANCISCO, January 27, 2026 - The RealReal, a leading online marketplace for verified resale luxury items, disclosed its plans to unveil its financial performance report for the fourth quarter and entire fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The results are scheduled for publication post-market closure on February 26, 2026. The RealReal (Nasdaq: REAL) is recognized as the largest platform globally for authenticated luxury goods.

data.title: TransAlta to report Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 27, 2026. conference call at 9:00 am MT.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, TransAlta Corporation, listed on TSX as TA and NYSE as TAC, announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 27, 2026, prior to market opening. Alongside this disclosure, the Company will also present its annual guidance for 2026. Interested individuals, including investors, analysts, and media personnel, can join a conference call and webcast discussing these results on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Mountain Time (11:00 a.m. ET).

data.title: Greenberg Traurig helps La Bevanda Holdings buy 100% of Puerto de Indias Gin from HIG Capital's Luxembourg affiliate.
data.description: In Miami on January 27, 2026, renowned law firm Greenberg Traurig, P.A. provided guidance to La Bevanda Holdings, the parent company of Licores de Guatemala, in its deal to purchase 100% ownership of Puerto de Indias, a prominent Spanish gin brand. The acquisition was from the Luxembourg affiliate of HIG Capital, a Miami-headquartered investment firm.

data.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. starts cash tender offers, aims to purchase undisclosed total principal amount.
data.description: In Pasadena, California on January 27, 2026, Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) revealed their initiation of cash tender offers to acquire a sum of principal amount without exceeding a certain aggregate figure.

data.title: Michael Burry, known for 'The Big Short,' shifted to Molina Healthcare stock in Q3 2025, selling UnitedHealth. Molina dropped 8% due to a low Medicare rate proposal for 2027. UnitedHealth fell 19%. Burry's move is proving to be risky.
data.description: In late 2025, Michael Burry, known for betting against the housing market, made a significant trading decision to liquidate his stake in UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE: UNH) and heavily invest in Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH). This move came amidst a challenging landscape for health insurers, marked by escalating medical costs and regulatory pressures. Following Burry’s strategic shift, MOH stock experienced notable movement, with shares of Molina dropping by 8% as the market reacted to a surprisingly low 2027 Medicare rate proposal from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS). In contrast, UnitedHealth saw a significant decline of 19%, while Humana, Inc. (NYSE: HUM) also faced challenges. This development was part of a turbulent day for major insurers as they navigated the implications of the CMS announcement. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Iron Bison Talent Partners, a new national recruiting firm, founded by Jesse Vazquez, backed by Open Pine Capital.
data.description: Today, on January 27, 2026, Iron Bison Talent Partners, a newly established national recruiting firm, unveiled its official launch. Spearheaded by Jesse Vazquez, a prominent figure in talent acquisition, and supported by Open Pine Capital, the company aims to assist businesses in streamlining their hiring processes. Iron Bison is dedicated to facilitating faster and more precise recruitment, offering a fresh approach to talent acquisition in the industry.
